description.unified: Quickly stabs the enemy, dealing Physical DMG. On a Critical Hit, applies [Wound] 1 stack and resets the cooldown. This skill’s DMG is increased by 20% per stack of [Wound]. [(removed) Gains immunity to all DMG while the skill is in use.]
Removes harmful effects from self and increases ATK and Critical Hit Chance by 500 for [20 sec->15sec].

Performs a series of attacks, dealing Physical Damage 9 times, then finishes with a powerful thrust that deals Physical Damage and knocks the enemy far away. The damage of this skill is increased by 20% per [Wound] stack, and all [Wound] stacks are consumed on the final hit.
On a Critical Hit, increases ATK for 10sec. This effect stacks up to 8 times.

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but the maximum number of [Wound Stacks] is increased to 10. [(removed) Deals 150% of ATK as extra DMG to enemies with 10 Wounds.]

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but the Critical Hit Chance increase effect is replaced with an effect that increases Critical Damage by [ (added) 65%], and damage dealt to bosses is increased by [25%->30%].

description.unified: [Float Like a Butterfly] Increases DMG by {0}%, and reduces the target's P.Block Chance by 500 for 10 sec.
[Shooting Star] Increases DMG by {0}%, and adds 1 Wound per attack.

dark.unified: When using a skill, has a [ (added) 10%] chance to increase your Critical Damage by [10%->7%]. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.unified: Each time a Critical Hit occurs, for 15 sec own Attack Speed is increased by {0} and Critical Damage is increased by {1}%. This effect stacks up to [5->8] times.
